idea-plugin.name: PineRootLabs Theme
idea-plugin.description:
PineRoot Labs Theme

A sleek, modern dark theme tailored for developers who love clean, high-contrast environments.

Features:

  • Deep dark background for reduced eye strain during long coding sessions.
  • Fresh mint and deep green accents for UI elements.
  • Vibrant Neon Green highlights for variables and special keywords to boost readability.

Crafted with care by Dev Caio Rodrigo.
